text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A centipede at that. My data says their bite is
poisonous, so I shall proceed with termination
protocol.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Do not worry. I will deal with this in the most
efficient manner possible.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I... Um... I appreciate the thought, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Can't we just take Mr. Centipede outside? Pretty
please?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I see no reason to argue. But are you not
frightened, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I am scared, but... I'm sure Mr. Centipede is
even more scared than me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Eek! M-Mr. Centipede, please... just... stay there,
okay?!
